index.heroDescription: Share what you actually care about — privately — and let the app translate both sides into something you can both hear.
index.step1Desc: Each party shares their fears and hopes separately. Neither side sees the other's raw answers — only the interpreted, empathic summary.
index.step2Desc: Your concerns get translated into human language the other side can actually hear without getting defensive.
index.step3Desc: Suggests relevant clauses based on both sides' actual concerns — not generic boilerplate.

auth.signUpDescription: Save your session and come back to it any time
auth.confirmationSent: We sent you a confirmation link.

newSession.describeQuestion: Describe the situation in your own words — the other party will describe it in theirs.
newSession.contextPlaceholder: e.g. "Hiring a contractor to deliver training for my clients", "Renting out my apartment", "Starting a business together"
newSession.yourConcerns: Your concerns, in your own words
newSession.concernsSubtitle: This stays between you and the app until the other party has shared too. No legal language needed — just honest feelings.
newSession.concernsLabel: What worries you most about this agreement?
newSession.concernsHint: What could go wrong? What keeps you up at night about this?
newSession.concernsPlaceholder: e.g. I'm worried they'll use my work to build something bigger and then cut me out once it's profitable…
newSession.protectLabel: What do you need to feel safe and protected?
newSession.protectHint: What would make this feel truly fair to you?
newSession.protectionsPlaceholder: e.g. I need to know I'll be compensated even if the project is cancelled halfway through…
newSession.outcomesLabel: What does a great outcome look like for you?
newSession.outcomesHint: Paint the picture of success from your side.
newSession.outcomesPlaceholder: e.g. In two years we're still working together and both feel the arrangement was fair from the start…
newSession.hesitationLabel: Anything you're hesitant to bring up directly?
newSession.hesitationHint: Things that feel awkward, sensitive, or hard to say out loud.
newSession.hesitationPlaceholder: e.g. I don't want to seem like I don't trust them, but I've been burned before in a similar situation…
newSession.signInToCreate: Please sign in to create a session.
newSession.pleaseDescribe: Please describe the agreement before continuing.

joinSession.welcomeTitle: {{name}} has invited you to find common ground
joinSession.welcomeTitleFallback: You've been invited to find common ground
joinSession.welcomeSubtitle: They've shared their perspective on an agreement you're both involved in. Once you share yours — in your own words — you'll both receive a mutual empathic summary. Neither of you will see each other's raw answers.
joinSession.welcomeFeature1Desc: The other party won't see what you write. You'll both only see the interpreted, empathic summary.
joinSession.welcomeFeature2Desc: A few honest questions about your concerns and hopes.
joinSession.agreementContext: Here's how they described the agreement
joinSession.otherPartyDescribed: Describe your side in your own words — don't worry about matching their framing.
joinSession.yourSideSubtitle: Describe the situation entirely in your own words.
joinSession.yourConcerns: Your concerns, in your own words
joinSession.concernsSubtitle: Just like the other party, this is private. Be as honest as you can — this is how you actually feel, not how you think you should feel.
joinSession.concernsLabel: What worries you most about this agreement?
joinSession.concernsHint: What could go wrong? What are you protecting yourself against?
joinSession.concernsPlaceholder: e.g. I'm worried I'll put in significant work and they'll exit without fairly compensating me…
joinSession.protectLabel: What do you need to feel safe and protected?
joinSession.protectionsPlaceholder: e.g. I need clear milestones with payment tied to each one…
joinSession.outcomesLabel: What does a great outcome look like for you?
joinSession.outcomesPlaceholder: e.g. We both succeed, the relationship stays strong, and we're proud of how we handled this…
joinSession.hesitationLabel: Anything you're hesitant to bring up directly?
joinSession.hesitationHint: Things that feel awkward, sensitive, or hard to say out loud.
joinSession.hesitationPlaceholder: e.g. I'm not sure they fully appreciate the value I'm bringing…
joinSession.linkMayBeInvalid: This link may be invalid or expired.
joinSession.signInToSubmit: Please sign in to submit your response.
joinSession.bothSubmitted: Both parties have now submitted. Ready to find common ground.

sessionView.waitingDescription: Send this link to the other party. Once they add their perspective, you'll both receive a mutual empathic summary and relevant legal clause suggestions.
sessionView.waitingNote: 💡 Save this link — once the other party responds, you'll both be able to view the full summary.
sessionView.bothSubmittedDesc: Ready to find common ground. The AI will read both sides and produce a mutual understanding — written so both of you can actually hear it.
sessionView.loadingMsg1: Looking for the human behind each concern…
sessionView.loadingMsg3: Translating fears into language you can both hear…
sessionView.empathicAnalysisTitle: Here's what you both care about
sessionView.analysisDescription: A mutual understanding — written so both sides can actually hear it. Your specific words remain private.
sessionView.nextStep: Start with the 'Conversation Starters' — then bring the suggested provisions to a lawyer to formalize what works for both of you.

privacy.title: Your words stay private
privacy.description: Neither side sees the other's raw answers — only the interpreted, empathic summary. Your exact words are never shown to the other party.
